name: EX-NEXT Backup Manager
description: Back up and restore model data from a KO Propo EX-NEXT transmitter to the PC.
notes: Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. English and Japanese manuals ship inside the zip. KO hosts this under /app/webroot/js/kcfinder/upload/files/, NOT the /upload/materials/ root their other tools use - that path 404s with an HTML body for this file, so do not 'tidy' the URL. KO's own page states data transfer is not guaranteed, so treat a failed read/write as expected behaviour rather than a bug.
